calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Reporter : Karen Farnsworth CSR 5162
Atty. Michael S. Rossoff, appearing for the Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
Witness for Plaintiff: Charissa Jones, present was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: WILLIE MCCOWAN.
The following exhibits were marked and admitted into evidence.
Exhibit 1 - Residential Rental Agreement
Exhibit 2 - 3 Day Notice
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 141 Eddy Street #218, San Francisco.
Past-due Rent $1,800.00
Attorney's Fees- $450.00
No Costs, for a Total of $2,250.00. Exhibits were returned to counsel.

Judgment signed in Open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)

Appearances:
Charissa Jones, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
Michael Sherwood Rossoff representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Willie Mccowan is not present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The settlement conference is off calendar because the defendant failed to appear. The trial date of September 10, 2007 remains on calendar.
